description: Concrete factual debugging question. Expected: problem_solving / guided_exploration. The lifeform must NOT redirect to emotional support, NOT auto-commit to a plan without confirming the failure mode first.

turns.user_input: My espresso machine keeps making the shot under-extracted. Beans are fresh, water is good. What else should I check?
Grind size is set to medium-fine. The puck looks dry afterwards, not muddy.
OK I will tighten the grind. Anything else worth tweaking before I touch anything else?
